title: Number of Valid Words for Each Puzzle

testcases.input: words = ["aaaa","asas","able","ability","actt","actor","access"], puzzles = ["aboveyz","abrodyz","abslute","absoryz","actresz","gaswxyz"] Output: [1,1,3,2,4,0] Explanation: 1 valid word for "aboveyz" : "aaaa" 1 valid word for "abrodyz" : "aaaa" 3 valid words for "abslute" : "aaaa", "asas", "able" 2 valid words for "absoryz" : "aaaa", "asas" 4 valid words for "actresz" : "aaaa", "asas", "actt", "access" There are no valid words for "gaswxyz" cause none of the words in the list contains letter 'g'.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,1,3,2,4,0] Explanation: 1 valid word for "aboveyz" : "aaaa" 1 valid word for "abrodyz" : "aaaa" 3 valid words for "abslute" : "aaaa", "asas", "able" 2 valid words for "absoryz" : "aaaa", "asas" 4 valid words for "actresz" : "aaaa", "asas", "actt", "access" There are no valid words for "gaswxyz" cause none of the words in the list contains letter 'g'.
